title: CSV provenance sidecar
description: CLAUDE.md §12 provenance sidecar for a sibling CSV file. CSV has no native top-level metadata slot; a sibling `<file>.csv.sources.json` carries the required `sources` array on its behalf. Mirrors boundary.sources.schema.json but for CSVs (the `for` pattern is `\.csv$`).

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Introduced for tools/lgd/snapshot.py outputs (LGD States/Districts CSV mirrors); reusable by any future CSV ingest that materialises a sibling reference dataset.

for.description: Basename of the sibling CSV this sidecar describes (e.g. "districts-latest.csv").

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. Optional `name` and `authority` fields align with district.schema.json v3.1 and feature_collection.metadata for uniform attribution.
